message:
chore: eliminate remaining FCP2 branding from Cargo.toml descriptions and module docs

Update 12 crate Cargo.toml descriptions and 6 crypto/sandbox module
doc comments from FCP2→FCP. Domain separation constants (b"FCP2-SIGN-V1",
b"FCP2-ZONE-KEY", etc.) are normative wire-format identifiers and are
intentionally preserved. Also fix sandbox test_socket_addr_allowed_tcp_connect
to use explicit ip_allow matching the raw_socket_host_policy tightening.

Verified: 481 crypto, 547 sandbox, 342 registry, 770 store, 1068 mesh,
3865 core, 453 protocol tests all pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
